presentation.title: AI Workbench Local — Policy / Contract Comparison
presentation.subtitle: Executive comparison review of grounded document differences
presentation.author: AI Workbench Local

executive_summary:
Executive Comparison:
Document v3.2 significantly expands on v3.1's updates, focusing on enhanced security controls and oversight.

- Introduces mandatory multi-factor authentication for all accounts.
- Increases privileged access review frequency to quarterly.
- Includes pre-onboarding vendor security reviews.
- Emphasizes immediate escalation for critical incidents.
- Maintains annual policy reviews but adds more detailed protocols.
- Enhances identity management through stronger controls.
key_highlights: Document v3.2 significantly expands on v3.1's updates, focusing on enhanced security controls and oversight.
Introduces mandatory multi-factor authentication for all accounts.
Increases privileged access review frequency to quarterly.
Emphasizes immediate escalation for critical incidents.
Maintains annual policy reviews but adds more detailed protocols.
